feed.title: Linguistic Typology
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Linguistic Typology (De Gruyter)

entry.title: A typology of positional differential argument marking
entry.summary: Authors: Ilja A. Seržant, Sergey Say, Andreas Hölzl, Aigul Zakirova, Xinyi Gao, Andreas Pregla DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2024-0021 Pages: Page range: 1-31

entry.title: The evolution of gender and number agreement in the noun phrase
entry.summary: Authors: Olena Shcherbakova, Marc Allassonnière-Tang, Francesca Di Garbo DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2024-0072 Pages: Page range: 33-52

entry.title: Direct speech, silent pauses, speech verbs, and basic word order: a comparative corpus study of 12 languages
entry.summary: Authors: Jocelyn Aznar, Frank Seifart DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2024-0032 Pages: Page range: 53-89

entry.title: Iconic features in nominal reduplication
entry.summary: Authors: Camil Staps DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2024-0042 Pages: Page range: 91-128

entry.title: John Haiman
entry.summary: Authors: Stephanie Farmer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0111 Pages: Page range: 129-133

entry.title: An obituary of Ian Maddieson
entry.summary: Authors: Heriberto Avelino DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2026-0007 Pages: Page range: 135-139

entry.title: Typology re-done: Greenberg Nos. 37, 45, 34
entry.summary: Authors: Frans Plank DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0092 Pages: Page range: 141-149

entry.title: Progress or regress in typology: a rebuttal of Plank (2026)
entry.summary: Authors: Thomas Berg DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2026-0016 Pages: Page range: 151-154

entry.title: Number in the world’s languages. A comparative handbook
entry.summary: Authors: Jessica K. Ivani DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lingty-2025-0060 Pages: Page range: 155-166
